name: Individualized fMRI-guided rTMS combined with Self-System Therapy versus mindfulness exercises in treatment-resistant depression

species.needs: OpenNeuro dataset_description.json / participants.tsv species metadata (not stated in fetched evidence; 'participants' with a clinical depression diagnosis implies human but is never stated verbatim)

evidence.quote: This dataset contains neuroimaging data from 28 participants with treatment-resistant depression (TRD) who received six weeks of active or sham repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation (rTMS) combined with psychotherapy.

short_desc_en.value: An OpenNeuro dataset released under CC0 containing structural and functional MRI (T1w, T2w, diffusion-weighted imaging, task-based and resting-state fMRI) from 28 participants with treatment-resistant depression who underwent six weeks of active or sham rTMS combined with psychotherapy.

evidence.quote: This dataset contains neuroimaging data from 28 participants with treatment-resistant depression (TRD) who received six weeks of active or sham repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation (rTMS) combined with psychotherapy.
The dataset includes structural and functional MRI data collected before and after the treatment protocol, including:

short_desc_es.value: Un conjunto de datos de OpenNeuro publicado bajo licencia CC0 con resonancia magnetica estructural y funcional (T1w, T2w, imagen de difusion, fMRI de tarea y en reposo) de 28 participantes con depresion resistente al tratamiento que recibieron seis semanas de rTMS activo o simulado combinado con psicoterapia.
